ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the institution */,
  "inst_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state where the institution is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the institution */,
  "admission_rate" REAL /* Admission rate as a percentage */,
  "undergrad_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total undergraduate enrollment */,
  "tuition_cost" REAL /* Annual tuition cost */,
  "median_earnings_10yr" REAL /* Median earnings 10 years post enrollment */,
  "median_earnings_6yr" REAL /* Median earnings 6 years post enrollment */,
  "median_debt" REAL /* Median student debt */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., Public, Private, Non-profit, For-profit) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "campus_size" INTEGER /* Size of the campus in acres */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students (including both undergraduate and graduate) */,
  "graduate_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of graduate students */,
  "faculty_count" INTEGER /* Number of faculty members */,
  "student_faculty_ratio" REAL /* Student-to-faculty ratio */,
  "endowment" REAL /* Total endowment of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the institution */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status (e.g., Accredited, Provisionally Accredited) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the region */,
  "education_spending" REAL /* Annual education spending in the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_data" (
  "tuition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tuition record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year the tuition applies to */,
  "tuition_amount" REAL /* Total tuition amount */,
  "in_state_tuition" REAL /* Tuition for in-state students */,
  "out_of_state_tuition" REAL /* Tuition for out-of-state students */,
  "international_tuition" REAL /* Tuition for international students */,
  "room_and_board" REAL /* Cost of room and board */,
  "books_and_supplies" REAL /* Average cost of books and supplies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tuition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_data_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the outcome record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "year_graduated" TEXT /* Year of graduation */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of graduates */,
  "median_starting_salary" REAL /* Median starting salary of graduates */,
  "graduate_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of students */,
  "retention_rate" REAL /* Retention rate of students */,
  "job_placement_rate" REAL /* Job placement rate of graduates */,
  "average_student_loan_debt" REAL /* Average student loan debt at graduation */,
  "average_salary_1_year" REAL /* Average salary 1 year post-graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_outcomes_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_debt" (
  "debt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the debt record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "debt_year" TEXT /* Year the debt applies to */,
  "median_debt" REAL /* Median debt for graduates */,
  "in_state_debt" REAL /* Median debt for in-state students */,
  "out_of_state_debt" REAL /* Median debt for out-of-state students */,
  "international_debt" REAL /* Median debt for international students */,
  "loan_default_rate" REAL /* Rate of loan defaults */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_debt_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_rates" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the admission record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year the admission rate applies to */,
  "admission_rate" REAL /* Admission rate as a percentage */,
  "application_count" INTEGER /* Number of applications received */,
  "acceptance_count" INTEGER /* Number of acceptances */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students who enrolled */,
  "yield_rate" REAL /* Yield rate (percentage of accepted students who enroll) */,
  "average_sat_score" INTEGER /* Average SAT score of admitted students */,
  "average_act_score" INTEGER /* Average ACT score of admitted students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_rates_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_statistics" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the enrollment record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year the enrollment statistics apply to */,
  "undergrad_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total undergraduate enrollment */,
  "graduate_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of graduate students */,
  "international_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "part_time_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of part-time students */,
  "full_time_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of full-time students */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Gender ratio of students (e.g., 0.5 for equal ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_statistics_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employment record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the employment statistics apply to */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of graduates */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary of graduates */,
  "job_placement_rate" REAL /* Job placement rate of graduates */,
  "average_student_loan_debt" REAL /* Average student loan debt at graduation */,
  "average_salary_1_year" REAL /* Average salary 1 year post-graduation */,
  "industry_sectors" TEXT /* Common industry sectors graduates work in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the aid record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year the aid applies to */,
  "total_aid_amount" REAL /* Total financial aid amount offered */,
  "grants_awarded" REAL /* Total amount of grants awarded */,
  "scholarships_awarded" REAL /* Total amount of scholarships awarded */,
  "loans_awarded" REAL /* Total amount of loans awarded */,
  "work_study_awarded" REAL /* Total amount of work-study awards */,
  "average_aid_per_student" REAL /* Average financial aid per student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the income record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level category (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for this income level */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary for this income level */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Specific income range (e.g., 0-30k, 30k-60k) */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Number of students in this income level */,
  "average_student_debt" REAL /* Average student debt for this income level */,
  "average_earnings_5_years" REAL /* Average earnings 5 years post-graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_levels_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object representing permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (reference to user_roles) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
